name: pyopenms
tagline: Wraps pyOpenMS (mass-spectrometry proteomics/metabolomics) into ready-to-run CLI scripts and API guidance.
verdict: Clean, well-scoped scientific-computing skill. No secret access, no network egress beyond a standard `pip install pyopenms` from PyPI, no obfuscated code, no hidden or manipulative instructions, and behavior matches the stated proteomics/metabolomics purpose. Clear when-to-use/when-not-to-use guidance (defers to matchms for simple cases) and concrete, action

highlights.summary: Scripts write to user-specified output paths but the doc never states overwrite/re-run behavior explicitly, so a rerun's effect on existing output files is left implicit.
